candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the balance-sheet point-in-time line.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as requested.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best match for short-term debt/current borrowings; excludes lease liabilities when used alone.
Would also represent current portion of long-term debt, but appears blank and less directly reported here.
Non-current debt, not STD.

variables.notes: Chose the clean current debt total. Excluded 'Current lease liabilities' per STD rule and avoided combining with maturities lines to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Direct match from shortlist for current taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Also a very clear taxes payable label on the balance sheet, arguably even more explicit for payable semantics.

variables.notes: Included both observed tax-payable labels as a priority list because labeling appears to vary across years. First choice is outside the shortlist but is semantically clear and reported on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact reported PPE line; preferred total/net PPE.
Gross PPE, less preferred than the reported total/net PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.

variables.notes: Used the reported PPE total/net line.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total assets row.

candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line.
Operating cash before some interest/tax items in many IFRS statements; less final than net cash from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash Generated from Operations - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not the reported cash flow total.

variables.notes: Primary choice is the net operating cash flow line; included the alternate operating cash label as a fallback for year-to-year label variation.
